label: Local government
description: RESERVED — US county, city, or special district. No facilities ingested yet; slug kept for future coverage.

label: University institute
description: RESERVED — campus-based research institute or center. No facilities ingested yet; slug kept for future coverage.

label: Network / consortium
description: Multi-institution network, consortium, or regional association

label: Industry
description: RESERVED — private or industry research facility. No facilities ingested yet; slug kept for future coverage.

label: Research vessel
description: RESERVED — research vessel treated as a mobile facility. No facilities ingested yet; slug kept for future coverage.

label: Observatory
description: Cabled observatory or ocean observing platform

label: Virtual
description: RESERVED — organization without a single physical headquarters. No facilities ingested yet; slug kept for future coverage.

label: Federal protected area
description: Federally-managed protected area: National Wildlife Refuge, National Park / Seashore / Lakeshore / Monument, USFS Research Natural Area, USFS Experimental Forest, designated Wilderness, etc. Often the underlying land for terrestrial coastal-ecosystem research.

label: State protected area
description: State-managed protected area: state park, state wildlife management area, state nature preserve, state estuarine reserve, state aquatic preserve, etc.

label: Private protected area
description: Privately-managed conservation property: TNC preserve, Audubon sanctuary, regional land trust holding, conservation easement, etc.
